text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun doesn't show up for training, so
I head out to look for her, when...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You seem pretty frazzled. Looking for something?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Lemme guess... You're looking for me,
aren'tcha?! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I know! Why don't you join us for hide-and-seek.
We're in the middle of a game right now. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh? Of course I'm okay... Oh, wait.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Training, right? Did you get worried when I didn't
show?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry! That face—I didn't mean to make you so
upset!
choice_data_list: Just be more careful next time.
Just be more careful next time.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I'll try my best not to worry you! I don't
want you looking like that ever again!
